rootCauseContract: Gemini CLI gateway mode uses Google GenerateContent and countTokens surfaces, while the safe-lab broker originally exposed only Chat Completions, Responses, and Anthropic Messages.
regressionChecks: system instructions, contents, tools, function calls, and function responses translate deterministically
streaming GenerateContent returns bounded SSE with exact model and usage metadata
countTokens is local and consumes no provider-call budget
a path model other than glm-5.2 is rejected before provider work
the run-scoped broker token is the only model credential in the lane
